description: Merge sk-code-web + sk-code-full-stack into a new umbrella skill `sk-code` with stack-detection-first smart routing. Web stack carried verbatim; non-web stacks (React, Node.js, Go, React Native, Swift) scaffolded as empty templated stubs pointing to sk-code-full-stack canonical. Both legacy skills preserved on disk untouched (additive frontmatter deprecation only); all 40 active cross-repo references retargeted; advisor protected from re-amplification via DEPRECATED_SKILLS exclusion list.
